title: xali's Enchanted Books Backported
description: Backport of the popular resource pack xali's Enchanted Books to version 1.12.2
body:
**Backport of the popular resource pack xali's Enchanted Books to version 1.12.2**

This resource pack will change the textures of enchantment books to unique options for each enchantment. Most books have unique textures, even depending on the enchantment level!

![A little preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66e5e5285ec4c80604c63a7e6fec377de5f13065.png)

Original resource pack: [xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books)
